text:
Soufflé (スフレ, Sufure) is a member of the Heil-Ly Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 378 

Appearance

Soufflé has an androgynous appearance, usually seen with a serious expression and piercing-looking eyes. Her fair hair falls above her shoulders, and her bangs reach her eyebrows. 

Personality

Soufflé dislikes details, as she has trouble remembering the route of the Heil-Ly's hideout and instead relies on Notre as a guide. Like her fellow members, she has sadistic tendencies and no qualms about killing many people. She seems close with Notre and Terebellum, the latter of whom she reminded multiple times about not fighting anyone who infiltrates the hideout. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 399 

Her profession suggests that she has an interest in technology and computers. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Soufflé is seen with the other Heil-Ly members as Morena uses her Contagion on them one at a time and explains how her Nen ability works. 

In Morena's office, the Heil-Ly boss tells Soufflé and Notre to return to Room 3131 and report back on the situation in Room 3101. A hacker and Transmuter, Soufflé (level 28) wonders how they return to Room 3131. A plumber and Conjurer, Notre (level 24) says that they just got back to the hideout using 3131 and then through the disposal area (the laundry room), explaining that they need to do the reverse and go through the laundry room to the processing area (the shower room) and then out through the living room. Soufflé is left confused and asks for the explanation again, but Notre replies that her confusion will get them killed and wonders what she would do without him. 

When Hinrigh and Nobunaga infiltrate the Heil-Ly's hideout, the two find Soufflé, Terebellum, and Gelato having a conversation about something. Hinrigh eventually gets their attention by yelling and asking them to confirm that it's the Heil-Ly's hideout and they are all members. After pretending to be scared by Hinrigh, Soufflé and Terebellum continue the conversation as if the two weren't there. 

Hinrigh suggests using one of his knives, and Nobunaga agrees since the door is most likely trapped as well, guessing that the members are so relaxed because they know the two of them can't go inside. Grasping his katana, Nobunaga says that he prefers to clean up trash as soon as he finds it, and Hinrigh reminds him that he was the one who suggested moving, agreeing with his trash comment and adding that he has plenty of knives to say hello. Hinrigh then hurls a knife toward Terebellum, and it pierces his head, causing the member to say that it hurt and to stand up from his chair. Soufflé can't believe that it's all the way in his head, but Terebellum calmly pulls it out, crushing the handle and revealing that the blade is missing. Hinrigh sees that the blade's tip is in the drink can Terebellum was holding, realizing that his ability involves matter transfer. 

Nobunaga says to himself that Terebellum is a bad match for him since he can't narrow down his ability, explaining that he could be an interceptor-type and that there are too many options for his conditions. As Soufflé grabs Terebellum's left arm and reminds him that they were told not to deal with intruders, Hinrigh throws another knife toward him, with Terebellum dodging and pushing Soufflé out of the way. Terebellum criticizes Soufflé for carelessly touching him, and she apologizes before saying that she will leave and reminding them that they shouldn't fight there. 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Soufflé is a Transmuter. Having reached level 28 with Morena's Nen ability, Soufflé's aura amount and output have been increased. She also obtained a Nen ability, which remains unknown. 

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

Soufflé is named after the dessert called soufflé. She shares a similar origin of her name with every other female member of the Heil-Ly Family: Cashew, Chiffon Toto, Gelato, and Montblanc Toto.
